message: Now that I finished the reflection, I should report back to Ms. White.

Dear Ms. White,

I have completed the activity. Please see attached.

Sincerely,

%player%
I should take Ms. White’s advice and talk to Dr. Kevin.

Dear Dr. Kevin,

My guidance counsellor, Ms. White, suggested I talk to you. I’m planning to go to postsecondary after I graduate, and I have a disability. Ms. White thinks I should know more about how it affects my learning. Do you have time to meet with me?

Sincerely,

%player%
